visual_description: In a dimly lit, tiled room with a greenish hue, an older man in a light-colored suit walks forward, gesturing with his right hand. He is followed by a group of younger men dressed in dark clothing, who stand in a line behind him. The men appear to be listening intently as the older man speaks.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin, giving a command. The tone is firm and authoritative. The background is quiet, with no other discernible sounds.
